acceptance_conditions.label: the new input, protocol, contract, executor, R165 helper, source manifest, and instrumented binary are hash-bound
three profiles and 192 post-registration candidate-traced calls are present
every complete candidate retains mapping, source score, leaves, and enumeration index
source selection reproduces the returned mapping and score on every call
all four declared arithmetic policies are replayed with first-seen tie handling
the new input hash and imported accelerator binary remain exact
zero simulation, shots, sampling, route changes, and hidden seeds are recorded
candidate-level replay does not claim an alternate search traversal
R166 evidence is upstream context only and no cross-input generality is claimed
forbidden bug, advantage, BQP, solved-frontier, and credit claims remain false

claim_boundary.what_is_supported: a newly frozen input candidate-level replay under declared profiles and policies
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: cross-input generality, production mapping change, alternate search path, confirmed Qiskit bug, hardware relevance, route advantage, quantum advantage, BQP separation, solved B4/B8/B10, or new credit
